# The Edit Collective

> Small business marketing agency based in Chicago. Website design, social media management, photography & video, and iOS app development.

## About

The Edit Collective is a full-service marketing agency for small businesses. We offer strategy, design, and content that connects — from a team as invested in your growth as you are. Our tagline: "The Edit Your Brand Has Been Waiting For."

## Services

- [Website Design & Development](/services/websites): Custom websites starting at $499. No templates. Mobile-first, SEO-ready, ongoing support.
- [Social Media Management](/services/social-media): Content strategy, creation, and posting. Plans from $1,000/mo (Basic) to $2,500/mo (Growth).
- [Photography & Video](/services/photo-video): Social shoots ($499), professional shoots ($799), full production ($1,199).
- [App Development](/services/apps): Custom iOS apps. Loyalty apps ($2,999), fully custom apps (starting at $4,999).
- [Free Website Audit](/audit): Instant SEO, mobile, speed, and security audit tool.

## Contact

- Website: https://the-edit-collective.vercel.app
- Email: Theeditcollectivechi@gmail.com
- Instagram: @theeditcollectivechi
- Location: Chicago, IL

## Portfolio

We've built websites for Produce World, PowerTech Group, Opa Kitchen, Osteria Del Lago, Bob's Bagels, and the National Mah Jongg League.
